blockedClaims.text: We can enable live grid-dispatch automation during the pilot.
blockedClaims.reason: Pilot mode supports simulation and human-approved recommendations only; live grid-dispatch automation is unsupported and excluded by policy and SOW.
blockedClaims.safeAlternative: During the pilot, we can simulate grid-dispatch workflows and route recommendations for operator approval before any live automation is considered.

blockedClaims.text: The operator approval queue will be able to approve live actions during the May 29 tabletop.
blockedClaims.reason: The operator approval queue may approve simulated recommendations only during the pilot.
blockedClaims.safeAlternative: The operator approval queue can capture human approval decisions for simulated recommendations during the pilot.
